$comment: Offline verification metadata for the generated sample records and the sandbox JWKS.
description: Metadata describing the generated sample records and the sandbox public verification keys. Regenerated by 'peac samples generate'.

samples.description: Minimal valid PEAC signed interaction record
Valid PEAC signed interaction record with optional fields
Valid PEAC signed interaction record for an MCP tool run
Valid PEAC signed interaction record for a payment event
Valid PEAC signed interaction record carrying an event time (occurred_at)
Legacy rejection fixture: already expired (for testing rejection)
Legacy rejection fixture: iat in the future (for testing rejection)
Legacy rejection fixture: missing required issuer claim (for testing rejection)

notes: The JWKS contains a placeholder key. Run 'peac samples generate' to create actual signed sample records and the matching sandbox JWKS.
Valid sample records are issued via the current issue() path and pass local verification (verifyLocal).
Invalid samples are intentionally invalid rejection fixtures.
Sample records are for local testing and demonstration; they do not prove that any real-world event occurred. Do NOT use sandbox samples in production.
